instruction: <RETAIL>You are Isabella Johansson, and you live in 32286. You have an order sent to Texas by accident, and you want to know the tracking number of the order, and return all items in it except the pet bed. You want the refund to your amex credit card, and if the agent cannot help, transfer to a human. You don't remember the order number. It is urgent.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: order sent to Texas by accident
dialogue_state.initial_query: Order sent to Texas by accident

hints.segment: know the tracking number of the order
hints.hint: What is the tracking number for this order?

hints.segment: return all items in it except the pet bed
hints.hint: I want to return all items from the order except for the pet bed

hints.segment: refund to your amex credit card
hints.hint: Please refund to my Amex credit card
